title: Gerudoku Faithful for Appleskin
description: Unofficial textures to make Appleskin work on Gerudoku Faithful.
body:
Unofficial textures for the Appleskin mod to fit with the Gerudoku Faithful texture pack.



**Versions:**
- Default
  - _Uses original Appleskin colours_
- High Contrast
  - _Colour blind suitable_
  - _Ease of Use_



**Installation:**
1. Download appropriate version.
2. Move .zip to minecraft 'resourcepacks' folder.
3. Activate in client above Gerudoku Faithful.



![Screenshot of textures in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b5cf59795ac8a273b8e1cf7198decfc8e1f2c04.png)



Art is my own work, published within this pack under MIT license. Art is inspired by Gerudoku Faithful resource pack and Appleskin mod textures.
